associated_event: Killing of Trayvon Martin and subsequent acquittal of George Zimmerman; later expanded through multiple cases of police violence (e.g., Michael Brown, Eric Garner, Tamir Rice)
phenomenon_type: social movement / digital activism / political intervention
short_description: #BlackLivesMatter is a hashtag that emerged in 2013 as a response to the acquittal of George Zimmerman in the killing of Trayvon Martin, evolving into a global movement that mobilizes against systemic anti-Black racism, police violence, and broader forms of state inequality.
